definitions.text: Short in length of time from the present.
examples: I need the soonest date you have available.

definitions.text: Used as an alternative to express 'to be going to' in the form 'to be soon to'.
examples: Hurry up, the wedding is soon to start!
A new shop is soon to be opened in this street.
His wife is likely to come too after him, but we just do not know how soon after.
